message:
fix(codegen): Fix assertRaises/try-except interaction issues

- Reset in_assert_raises_context inside TryHelper function body to prevent
  labeled breaks from crossing function boundaries (SIGILL fix)
- Add break to __ar_blk_N after except handler body when in assertRaises
  context to properly signal exception was caught
- Only skip function_def in except handlers when at module level (where
  hoisting happens), generate inline when inside functions/methods
